name: 酸碱理论
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 酸碱氧化还原 / Acids, Bases & Redox / Acids, Bases & Redox
curriculum_points: HS-PS1-5: Apply scientific principles and evidence to provide an explanation about the effects of changing the temperature or concentration of the reacting particles on the rate at which a reaction occurs.
HS-PS1-6: Refine the design of a chemical system by specifying a change in conditions that would produce increased amounts of products at equilibrium.
